name: ExtensionDeviceUsage_UsageStatus
title: R5: The status of the device usage, for example always, sometimes, never. This is not the same as the status of the statement (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DeviceUsage.usageStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DeviceUsage.usageStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DeviceUsage.usageStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DeviceUsage.usageStatus` has a context of DeviceUseStatement based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DeviceUseStatement`.
Element `DeviceUsage.usageStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The status of the device usage, for example always, sometimes, never. This is not the same as the status of the statement (new)
element.comment:

binding.description: Codes representing the usage status of the device.
